name: oncall-April-26
description: Triage fake account reaction spam attack. ~16K+ bot accounts (member ID range 1.708B-1.725B, T3/T4) are hitting voyagerSocialDashReactions endpoint trying to CREATE reactions on activity:7401998949139865600 with incorrect activityUrn, causing 4xx errors in ~2.5hr burst cycles. QCS rate limiting not triggering because each member only sends 1 request per cycle (distributed attack). Feed SOT team (Kavita Malani) reported. Rui Han confirmed 49/71 sample accounts already restricted by IP/profile clustering. Need to confirm full population, assess mass action, and recommend blocking strategy.

artifacts.description: incident-11057 Slack thread - Feed SOT team reported fake account reaction spam
Main Slack thread for reaction spam triage discussion (incident-11057)
Target activity URN being spammed with reaction CREATE requests
QCS counter lix for voyagerSocialDashReactions - was 50% ramped, now activated to 100%
